steps.title: Fit price as a function of side length
steps.content: Use side length $s$ as $x$ and price $P$ as $y$. Enter the table points $(3,8)$, $(6,18)$, and $(9,28)$ and run $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the fitted equation
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=\frac{10}{3}$ and $b=-2$, so the relationship is $P=\frac{10}{3}s-2$. This checks because $\frac{10}{3}(3)-2=8$ and $\frac{10}{3}(6)-2=18$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is $P=\frac{10}{3}s-2$, so C is correct.
